# Clawmart

> Clawmart Studio: describe a company or SaaS idea, and a founding team of
> five AI agents — strategist, brand, product, landing page, marketing —
> drafts the whole company live. You get a business plan, a name and brand
> identity, a product spec, a public standalone landing page, and a launch
> kit. Free to use, up to three companies per account. Every output is an
> AI-generated draft, honestly labeled as such — a starting point, not a
> guarantee.

## Studio

- [Clawmart Studio](https://clawmart.co): type an idea, watch the
  founding team work in real time, and come away with a full first draft of
  the company — plan, brand, product spec, landing page, and launch kit.
- Every finished company gets a public standalone page at
  `https://clawmart.co/c/<slug>` that you can share.

## How it works

1. Describe the company or SaaS idea in a sentence or two.
2. Five AI agents draft in sequence: the strategist writes the business plan,
   brand names it and shapes the identity, product writes the spec, landing
   builds the public page, and marketing assembles the launch kit.
3. Watch the drafts appear live, then share the public company page.

## Honesty

Everything the Studio produces is an AI-generated draft — labeled as such on
the page. It is a fast first pass to react to and refine, not validated
research, legal advice, or a guarantee of results. Free to use, limited to
three companies per account.
